title: File Compression and Optimization Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about the critical role of file optimization in modern web development.

questions.question: Which of these libraries is the industry standard for high-performance image processing (resizing, converting, etc.) in Node.js?
What is the primary benefit of converting images to the WebP format?
options: It's the only format compatible with mobile devices.
It provides superior compression, which leads to much smaller file sizes than JPEG or PNG at similar quality levels.

questions.question: Which Express.js middleware can you use to automatically compress almost all HTTP responses (JSON, HTML, etc.)?
What is 'Stripping Metadata' and why is it useful?
options: Removing non-image data like GPS coordinates and camera information from an image file.
A way to encrypt files using a secret key.
To automatically generate a backup of the data.

questions.question: What does Gzip or Brotli compression typically achieve for text-based responses (HTML, JSON, etc.)?
options: No reduction, it's strictly for audio and video files.
